ACCOUNT# D00137662498 ADM DATE:03/11/26 UNIT RCRD #: D002337443 ARRIVAL:
REASON FOR VISIT/CHIEF COMPL:DISPLACED FRACTURE OF HEAD RIGHT RADIUS
flexion-extension. Redislocated the radial head and retrieved the trial. We tamped in place our final
implant. I closed the extensor wad with a running locking stitch attached to the G2 Mitek anchor
which was buried in his condyle. I ran and locked this to repair the deep fascia as well as the
superficial fascia overlying the radial head. 2-0 Vicryl was used. Subcutaneous tissue followed by 2-
0 Prolene. Sterile dressing was placed. He was placed in a sling. He was extubated and transferred
to the PACU in stable condition.
Electronically Signed by Silverberg, David A MD on 03/11/26 at 1353
